title: The Fighting Maiden
overview: Takuma's classmates are so terrified of him that they're convinced he's responsible for the Akuma attacks across the city. The nine Valkyries he lives with know better.

title: The Binding Maiden
overview: Itsuyo quickly became the student council president, but can she quickly level up before the next battle? Perhaps Takuma can help sate her desire.

title: The Secret Maiden
overview: Mutsumi is overjoyed she's finally on a date with Takuma! There's only one problem: She's an idol, so it could ruin both the date and her career if someone recognizes her.

title: The Serving Maiden
overview: Futaba is crazy strong and when she plays tag, she plays for keeps. The upcoming campus festival offers an opportunity for a date, but does danger lurk on the horizon?

title: The Believing Maiden
overview: The Valkyries have the perfect opportunity to level up at the campus festival. Unfortunately for them, their attendance gives Garum the chance he's been waiting for.

title: The Naked Maiden
overview: Futaba fights Garm as the other Valkyries face a fierce onslaught. Takuma and Natsuki prepare to take their relationship to the next level to save them.

title: The Reeling Maiden
overview: "Dr." Takuma gives the Valkyries a physical examination. Afterwards, Misa starts a date with Takuma so Itsuyo can take notes.

title: The Strengthening Maiden
overview: Mutsumi and Yakumo need to get stronger, fast! But that's easier said than done since Takuma finds Yakumo extremely intimidating.

title: The Touching Maiden and the Touched Maiden
overview: As a third party plots their next move, Takuma must save Itsuyo from… Natsuki? Ichika is still level 1 and needs Takuma’s help. Too bad she thinks he’s pathetic.

title: The Drunken Maiden
overview: Natsuki has a hunch regarding what Takuma brought home from this store, and she doesn't like it one bit... so she takes matters into her own hands!

title: The Accepting Maiden
overview: Futaba fights Skuld and the akuma alone so Ichika and Takuma can launch a sneak attack. Everything goes according to plan until Takuma senses something’s wrong...

title: The Loving Maiden!
overview: Nine Valkyries descended from the heavens to fight akuma. But victory often comes at a price. There may only be eight Valkyries remaining when the dust settles...
